title: Rapper Binh Gold duong tinh voi ma tuy va bi CSGT truy bat tren cao toc la ai?
content_markdown:
# Rapper Binh Gold duong tinh voi ma tuy va bi CSGT truy bat tren cao toc la ai?

Nguon: VietnamNet. Ghi chu: ban ghi offline nay la tom tat/paraphrase de phuc vu bai tap crawl khi moi truong khong co network; khi chay script co internet, noi dung se duoc thay bang ket qua crawl truc tiep.

Bai viet gioi thieu rapper Binh Gold trong boi canh co thong tin anh duong tinh voi ma tuy va bi luc luong canh sat giao thong truy bat tren cao toc. Phan thong tin nhan vat neu ten nghe danh, hoat dong am nhac, mot so san pham duoc chu y va nhung tranh cai quanh hinh anh, ngon tu trong san pham nghe thuat. Phan su kien tap trung vao viec co quan chuc nang xu ly mot truong hop dieu khien o to co dau hieu nguy hiem va lien quan den ket qua kiem tra ma tuy.

Day la bai phu hop cho bo du lieu vi lien ket truc tiep giua nghe si duong dai, hanh vi ngoai doi va van de thuc thi phap luat ve ma tuy. Khi dua vao he thong truy van, cac truong metadata nen giu ro rang: source_url la URL bai bao, title la tieu de, date_crawled la thoi diem script chay, content_markdown la noi dung crawl hoac tom tat.
